Bash(cat "/Users/arnaudlery/Desktop/poliscope copy/questions_final.json" | python3 -c "
import json,sys,re
data=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
dups=[q for q in data if q.get\('text',''\).startswith\('DUPLICATE'\)]
for d in dups:
    m=re.match\(r'DUPLICATE of \(\\w+\)', d['text']\)
    if m:
        d['isDuplicate']=True
        d['duplicateOf']=m.group\(1\)
        d['text']=''
    
print\(json.dumps\(data[:5], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)
print\(f'Total dups: {len\(dups\)}'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('/tmp/questions_old.js', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Extract all question blocks
pattern = re.compile\(
    r'\\{\\s*id:\\s*`\([^`]+\)`.*?text:\\s*\\{.*?fr:\\s*`\([^`]+\)`.*?\\}.*?direction:.*?info:\\s*\\{.*?fr:\\s*`\([^`]+\)`.*?\\}\\s*\\}',
    re.DOTALL
\)

matches = pattern.findall\(content\)
print\(f"Found: {len\(matches\)} questions"\)
for m in matches[:3]:
    print\(m[0], '|', m[1][:50], '|', m[2][:50]\)
EOF)
